note_main_file: id=20 Improved Judgements (spec_tree=-1) is a Ret-tree talent — not duplicated here. Flags confirmed correct.
id=23 Conviction (spec_tree=-1) is a Ret-tree talent — not duplicated here. Carrier spell confirmed Paladin family.
_notes.note_no_shared_bits: No shared Paladin family marker bits identified across all 14 verified carrier spells. No exclusions required.

confirmed_flags.Judgement_of_Light_20271: [8388608,0,0] = 0x00800000 (mask0 bit23) — confirms main-file id=20 flags are CORRECT
confirmed_flags.Seal_of_Righteousness_20154: [134217728,536870912,0] = mask0 bit27|mask1 bit29 — same as Holy id=200
confirmed_flags.Crusader_Strike_35395: [0,32768,0] = mask1 bit15(0x8000) — confirms Paladin family; carrier for all-ones entries

talent_affixes._todo: Benediction (5r, tier 1) — Reduces mana cost of Judgements by 5%/rank and Seals by 5%/rank. Now that JoL flags [8388608,0,0] and SoR flags [134217728,536870912,0] are known, these could be two separate entries (one for Judgements, one for Seals). Deferring — add if needed.
Heart of the Crusader (3r, tier 2) — Your Judgements increase the target's chance to be critically hit by all attacks by 1/2/3%. Debuff applied to target, not a caster SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Blessing of Might
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[2,0,0]=0x2 (mask0 bit1). No shared Paladin marker bits. BoM attack-power EFFECT1 +10%/rank.

talent_affixes.name: Conviction
talent_affixes.notes: All paladin spell crit +1% per rank — all-ones mask matches every Paladin family spell. Carrier Crusader Strike(35395) confirmed Paladin family.

talent_affixes._todo: Seal of Command (1r, tier 3) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Pursuit of Justice (2r, tier 3) — Increases movement speed by 5/10% and reduces the duration of fear effects by 10/20%. Movement speed and mechanic resistance, not implementable as SpellMod.
Eye for an Eye (2r, tier 3) — When struck by a critical hit, 20/40% of the damage is reflected. Proc-based damage reflect, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Sanctified Seals
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[134217728,536870912,0]: same as Holy id=200 Seals of the Pure — SoR mask0 bit27|mask1 bit29. NOTE: Seal of Vengeance(31801) not yet run. Seal crit +1%/rank (CRIT_CHANCE FLAT: 100=1%). Dispel resistance not implementable.

talent_affixes.name: Crusade
talent_affixes.notes: All Paladin spell damage and healing +1%/rank. All-ones used — talent affects Crusader Strike, Hammer of the Righteous, and all Holy spells; Holy school cannot be targeted via family SpellMod. All-ones is slightly broad but acceptable for Ret spec affixes.

talent_affixes._todo: Two-Handed Weapon Specialization (3r, tier 4) — Increases all damage dealt by 2/4/6% while wielding a two-handed weapon. Weapon-type conditional melee stat, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Fanaticism
talent_affixes.notes: Reduces threat from all Paladin spells by 10%/rank. All-ones matches every Paladin family spell. NOTE: talent also increases crit chance on Judgements — the Judgements-specific crit portion could use flags=[8388608,0,0] (JoL confirmed) as a separate entry if needed.

talent_affixes._todo: Repentance (1r, tier 5) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Swift Retribution (3r, tier 6) — Increases attack speed and spell casting speed by 1/2/3% for all party/raid members. Aura haste buff, not implementable as a personal SpellMod.
Sanctified Retribution (1r, tier 6) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

talent_affixes.name: Vengeance
talent_affixes.notes: Holy spell critical strike damage bonus +3%/rank. All-ones used — Holy school cannot be targeted via Paladin family SpellMod; acceptable for Ret spec affixes.

talent_affixes._todo: Divine Purpose (2r, tier 7) — Reduces enemy chance to resist Holy spells by 2/4%. Could be RESIST_MISS_CHANCE FLAT (-200=-2%), but 'Holy school' resist requires knowing which spells carry it. Deferring.
The Art of War (4r, tier 7 — verify rank count) — After a melee crit, reduces cast time of next Exorcism/Flash of Light. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.
Judgements of the Wise (3r, tier 7) — After using a Judgement ability, restores 15/30/45% of base mana. Proc-based mana return, not implementable as SpellMod.

Righteous Vengeance (3r, tier 8) — Your Judgement and Divine Storm critical hits cause additional damage equal to 10/20/30% of total damage over 8 sec. Proc-based DoT on crit, not implementable as SpellMod.

Sheath of Light (3r, tier 8) — Grants 30/60/90% of attack power as bonus spell power, and your critical heals grant a HoT equal to 30% of the heal. Stat conversion + heal proc, not implementable as SpellMod.
Tier 9 talent — verify name and rank count for 3.3.5a.
Divine Storm (1r, tier 10) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
